ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Bypass_Apex__c = false, $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false, NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(AccountId), NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(AccountId))), /* Configure BypassSpecificValidationRule */ NOT($Setup.BypassSpecificValidationRule__c.ContactCannotChangeCompany__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot update the Company field. Please use the Move Contact button at the top right of the page.
